name: NGINX — FastDL
description: NGINX with script to configure it as the monitor's fast download web server.

configFiles.template:
✔ nginx is running

Served over HTTP and HTTPS (self-signed certificate).

📦 Fast Downloads (FastDL)

This server can act as a Fast Download host, serving game files from the /FastDL/ path over HTTPS.

To turn it on, open this service in the TCAdmin control panel and run the Enable Fast Downloads script. It points this server's Fast Download storage here and enables FastDL.

Fast Downloads must also be enabled and configured for each individual game before its services will mirror and serve their files here.

Powered by TCAdmin · nginx

script.name: Change Service Name
script.description: Prompts for a new name and renames this service.

script.name: Enable Fast Downloads
script.description: Points this server's Fast Download storage at {service}/www/FastDL (created if missing) and serves it over HTTPS.

script.name: Disable Fast Downloads on delete
script.description: On service delete, clears this server's Fast Download storage/URL if it still pointed at this service.

script.name: Configure nginx HTTPS (self-signed cert + HTTP/HTTPS config)
script.description: Generates a self-signed cert + HTTP/HTTPS nginx config and a Fast Downloads landing page. Runs on every container start.
